form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1650m, 3 len behind California Moxie with 52.5kg at $22. The race before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1200m, 3 len behind Somelovefromabove carrying 56kg at $43. Rates highly on his best performances and deserves another chance.
